nodeMixNote: HBM capacity ramp underway; Micron acquired a wafer fab in Tongluo, Taiwan (Powerchip, $1.8B) completed March 15, 2026, signaling node-eligible DRAM wafer capacity expansion
rationale: Micron's cash capex for PP&E in the first six months of FY2026 was $11,776M vs. $7,261M in the prior-year period (a ~62% YoY increase), and on March 15, 2026 Micron completed the $1.8B acquisition of a wafer fab from Powerchip in Taiwan, both disclosed in the MU 10-Q for the quarter ended February 26, 2026.
